channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Threads is going all-in on the fediverse, and users have some questions
item.description: Threads is going deeper into the fediverse, the interconnected social platform ecosystem based on an open protocol called ActivityPub that includes apps such as Mastodon and BookWyrm.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: US officials tout encryption apps amid Salt Typhoon cyberattack
item.description: Federal officials are calling on telecommunication companies to boost national security by using encrypted messaging apps following an unprecedented Chinese hacking campaign against more than half a dozen telecom firms in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Meta to build $10 billion AI data center in Louisiana as Elon Musk expands his Tennessee AI facility
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The largest artificial intelligence data center ever built by Facebook’s parent company Meta is coming to northeast Louisiana, the company said Wednesday, bringing hopes that the $10 billion facility will transform an economically neglected corner of the state. Republican Gov.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK and ADRIAN SAINZ, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: White House says at least 8 US telecom firms, dozens of nations impacted by China hacking campaign
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A top White House official on Wednesday said at least eight U.S. telecom firms and dozens of nations have been impacted by a Chinese hacking campaign.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: This GSA official takes on the dark underside of Artificial Intelligence
item.description: "We need AI tools in place to help us plan around climate events, to help us plan around looking at ways in which we can accommodate," said Dan Pomeroy. The post This GSA official takes on the dark underside of Artificial Intelligence first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Senators ramp up pressure on House to pass online safety, privacy package in lame-duck session
item.description: A group of bipartisan senators pushed House Republican leadership on Wednesday to pass the Kids Online Safety and Privacy Act (KOSPA) before the end of the year as it remains stalled in the lower chamber. In a letter sent to House Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) and Majority Leader Steve Scalise (R-La.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: High Impact Service Providers in 2025: The State of Federal CX
item.description: Explore what’s next for HISP agencies as they transform customer, employee and total experience The post High Impact Service Providers in 2025: The State of Federal CX first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Your Netflix account is not suspended – how to avoid the latest SMS scam
item.description: A Netflix SMS scam has again resurfaced, claiming that your account has been suspended –here's how to stay safe.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: District of Columbia says Amazon secretly stopped fast deliveries to 2 predominantly Black ZIP codes
item.description: The District of Columbia sued Amazon on Wednesday, alleging the company secretly stopped providing its fastest delivery service to residents of two predominantly Black neighborhoods while still charging millions of dollars for a membership that promises the benefit.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: President-Elect Trump Appoints Gail Slater for Antitrust Division Leadership
item.description: Learn about President-elect Trump's appointment of Gail Slater to lead the Justice Department's antitrust division and its implications.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: OpenAI's Sam Altman 'not that worried' about rival Elon Musk's influence in the Trump administration
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, who is in a legal dispute with rival Elon Musk, said he is “not that worried” about Musk's influence in the incoming Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Fortinet launches integrated cloud app security service
item.description: Fortinet has melded some of its previously available services into an integrated cloud package aimed at helping customers secure applications.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: OECD: GenAI is affecting jobs previously thought safe from automation
item.description: According to a new report from the Organization for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD), generative AI (genAI) will soon affect work areas previously considered to have a low likelihood of automation, according to The Register.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The first ‘AI elections’ weren’t as disastrous as predicted. Here’s why
item.description: It’s been the biggest year for elections in human history: 2024 is a “super-cycle” year in which 3.7 billion eligible voters in 72 countries had the chance to go to the polls.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: AWS upgrades its 10p10u network to handle massive AI clusters
item.description: While virtualized compute is the foundation of cloud computing, enabling all that compute to transmit data is the job of the network.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Lawyers for Silicon Valley’s ‘Bitcoin Jesus’ say his tax case violates constitution
item.description: US prosecutors charged Roger Ver with evading more than $48 million in taxes for selling $240 million in tokens and with filing a false “exit tax” return after he renounced his US citizenship in 2014.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: AWS amplifies developer tools with new gen AI features
item.description: AWS is leaving no stone unturned to get generative AI tools embedded into every aspect of application development. At its annual re:Invent conference, AWS CEO Matt Garman showcased a large of number of features and tools that the company has built for developers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft moves to stop M365 Copilot from ‘oversharing’ data
item.description: As Microsoft pushes for businesses to adopt its Microsoft 365 Copilot, many customers have run into a major stumbling block: the AI assistant’s ability to surface confidential information to employees.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 20 handy hidden tricks for Google Calendar on Android
item.description: Google Calendar is a core part of the Android productivity package — but if all you’re using is what you see on the app’s surface, you’re missing out on some pretty powerful possibilities. Yes, oh yes: Just like so many of our modern digital tools, there’s more to Google Calendar than meets the eye.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 4 ways to build a team equipped with emerging skills
item.description: We’ve all heard about how difficult the job market is on the applicant side, with candidates getting very little response from prospective employers. But the hiring side isn’t much easier.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: JPMorgan Chase builds ambitious AI foundation on AWS
item.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has deployed an internal AI assistant dubbed LLM Suite to more than 200,000 employees and is generating genuine value from its early AI investments.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The UAE’s digital transformation: A visionary leap into the future
item.description: As the United Arab Emirates celebrates its 53rd National Day, it reflects on an extraordinary journey of transformation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: AWS Database Migration Service gets gen AI-powered schema conversion
item.description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) has updated its Database Migration Service’s schema conversion feature with a new generative AI-powered capability that automates schema conversion to a great extent.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AWS’ Amazon Connect service gets new-gen AI updates
item.description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) has updated its Amazon Connect contact center service to help enterprises offer a better end-to-end customer experience, the company announced at its ongoing annual re:Invent conference.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Helpful Hack: Siri's new tricks, photo magic and writing help with iOS 18.1's new AI features
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how to update your iPhone to add Apple Intelligence, which he says can transform your interactions with your phone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Artificial intelligence changes across the US
item.description: As more companies implement artificial intelligence for daily tasks, some industry leaders are working to push back against certain aspects of the technology.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Canadian news publishers sue OpenAI over alleged copyright infringement
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — A coalition of Canadian news publishers, including The Canadian Press, Torstar, Globe and Mail, Postmedia and CBC/Radio-Canada, has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI for using news content to train its ChatGPT generative artificial intelligence system.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Siberia's 'Gateway to Hell' crater fuels new fears
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says the Batagaika crater in Siberia expands 35 million cubic feet yearly due to thawing.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
